about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A software engineer who values clarity, maintainability, and real-world problem-solving.
body: I focus on building clear, maintainable web products with Svelte and small tooling.
Recent work includes a custom static site generator, bilingual portfolios, and performance audits.
I like simple stacks, explicit manifests, and shipping without surprise magic.
